about.title: WHO WE ARE
paragraphs: Founded in {foundingYear} in Portugal, Devloper.eu was born from the vision of revolutionizing the business automation market through artificial intelligence. We are pioneers in integrating custom AI agents that transform complex processes into efficient and scalable solutions.

Our unique approach combines cutting-edge technology with a deep understanding of each client's specific needs. We develop solutions that not only automate tasks but continuously evolve and adapt, providing a real competitive advantage in the European market.

advantages.subtitle: WHY COMPANIES THRIVE WITH US

efficiency.title: INCREASED EFFICIENCY
efficiency.description: Custom AI agents simplify repetitive tasks, freeing up human resources to focus on high-impact activities.

experience.title: ENHANCED CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE
experience.description: AI agents provide quick and accurate responses and personalized interactions, increasing customer satisfaction and loyalty.

insights.title: DATA-DRIVEN INSIGHTS
insights.description: By analyzing interactions and outcomes, these agents provide valuable insights for better decision-making and strategy refinement.

scalability.title: SCALABILITY
scalability.description: Custom agents adapt easily as your business grows, enabling seamless expansion of automated support, marketing, and sales processes.

integration.title: SEAMLESS INTEGRATION
integration.description: AI agents integrate easily with your existing systems, ensuring smooth adoption without disrupting current workflows.

growth.title: ACCELERATED GROWTH
growth.description: Leverage AI-powered automation to increase productivity, optimize performance, and achieve your business goals faster than ever.

questions.question: Is implementing custom AI agents expensive?
questions.answer: There is an initial investment, but the benefits pay off in the long run. Our AI agents reduce operational costs and increase efficiency, ensuring a good return on investment.

questions.question: Will AI agent integration be too complex for our existing systems?
questions.answer: No. Our agents are designed for simple integration with your infrastructure, ensuring smooth implementation with full support from our team.

questions.question: How secure is our data when using AI agents?
questions.answer: We prioritize security with robust protocols, meeting all industry standards and offering continuous monitoring to protect your information.

questions.question: Will AI agents replace our employees?
questions.answer: No. The agents are designed to complement your team, automating routine tasks so employees can focus on strategic activities.

questions.question: How soon can we expect to see a return on investment (ROI)?
questions.answer: Companies typically see significant improvements in the first few months of deployment, with ROI varying according to project scope.

questions.question: Can AI agents be customized to meet our unique business needs?
questions.answer: Yes. We develop fully customized solutions, tailored to your specific processes and objectives.

questions.question: What kind of ongoing support and maintenance is required?
questions.answer: We provide comprehensive post-implementation support, including updates, monitoring, and adjustments as needed.

questions.question: Can we trust that AI agents will perform consistently and error-free?
questions.answer: Our agents are rigorously tested and have continuous improvement protocols, ensuring high reliability and accuracy.

questions.question: How will AI agents impact our customer relationships?
questions.answer: Agents enhance service with quick and accurate responses, increasing customer satisfaction while your team focuses on more strategic interactions.

footer.description: Transforming businesses through digital innovation and customized AI solutions.

acceptance.title: 1. ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Devloper.eu's services, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use our services.

services.title: 2. DESCRIPTION OF SERVICES
services.content: Devloper.eu provides AI consulting, software development, and customized technology solutions.

userResponsibilities.title: 3. USER RESPONSIBILITIES
userResponsibilities.intro: When using our services, you agree to:
items: Maintain the confidentiality of your access credentials
Not use the services for illegal purposes

intellectualProperty.title: 4. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
intellectualProperty.content: All content, trademarks, logos, software, and technologies used on the platform are the property of Devloper.eu or its licensors and are protected by intellectual property laws.

liability.title: 5. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
liability.content: Devloper.eu shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use the services.

modifications.title: 6. MODIFICATIONS TO TERMS
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will take effect upon posting of the updated terms on our platform.

termination.title: 7. TERMINATION
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to the services immediately, without prior notice, for any breach of these terms.

applicableLaw.title: 8. APPLICABLE LAW
applicableLaw.content: These terms are governed by the laws of Portugal. Any dispute shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Portugal.
